---
title: "Simulations"
description: "Monte Carlo, agent-based models, stochastic simulations, RL agents, tournament replications."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
180 TUTORIALS
:::

# Simulations

Monte Carlo, agent-based models, stochastic simulations, RL agents, tournament replications.
